narratives.evidence_quote: इसका अंदाजा सभी को है कि अगर ऐसा होता है तो यह पूर्ण पैमाने पर तीसरे विश्व युद्ध से बस एक कदम दूर होगा.
narratives.reasoning: The text presents Putin's assertion that a direct NATO-Russia confrontation would bring the world close to a full-scale war, i.e., it speculates about war outcomes.

narratives.evidence_quote: परमाणु युद्ध का हर किसी को है अंदाजा
narratives.reasoning: The text includes a direct warning about nuclear war, an explicit fear-inducing claim about severe consequences.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: By continuing the war we risk WWIII
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने चेतावनी दी कि रूस और नाटो के बीच सीधा टकराव तीसरे विश्व युद्ध की तरफ पहला कदम होगा
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote explicitly warns that a direct clash between Russia and NATO would be the first step toward World War III, illustrating a fear-based argument about escalating war.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: परमाणु युद्ध का हर किसी को है अंदाजा
subnarratives.reasoning: The statement asserts that nuclear war is something everyone imagines could happen, directly supporting the subnarrative about the real possibility of nuclear weapon use.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस मॉडर्न दुनिया में कुछ भी मुमकिन है
subnarratives.reasoning: This generic fear-evoking line indicates an escalation in the modern world and supports the parent narrative without fitting the specific subnarratives.
